claim.summary: Lane 2 produced a reusable structural contact-control artifact for mask, pose, contact, depth, normal, occlusion, collision, and soft-body controls. The artifact is provisional structural evidence only; no EC2 or live ComfyUI runtime validation was performed by Lane 2.

artifacts.description: Canonical reusable mask, pose, depth, normal, occlusion, contact-pair, soft-body, and QA artifact.
Precise Lane 1 graph-wiring request for per-hand masks, QA previews, soft-body controls, metadata, and API/runtime binding.
Project evidence mirror of the canonical contact-control artifact.
Project evidence mirror containing explicit per-character, per-hand, and contact-zone mask requirements.
Project evidence mirror containing pose, depth, normal, occlusion, collision, and deformation requirements.

checks.name: shared_instructions_read
checks.notes: Required shared docs, model/effort assignment, and Lane 2 instructions were read before evidence edits.

checks.name: main_flow_not_edited_by_lane2
checks.notes: Lane 2 did not directly modify WAVE42_MAIN_FLOW_20260702.json.

checks.name: ec2_not_started_or_stopped
checks.notes: No EC2 lease, start, stop, or endpoint action was performed by Lane 2.

checks.name: artifact_json_parse
checks.notes: The canonical artifact parsed successfully with PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json.

checks.name: runtime_generation_proof
checks.notes: This pass produced architecture/evidence artifacts only; runtime proof belongs to Lane 4.

checks.name: actual_mask_image_existence
checks.notes: No actual per-hand or contact mask image files were generated because no source image was provided and placeholder masks would be misleading.

failure_reasons: Per-hand mask slots are not yet wired directly in Main Flow; Lane 1 wiring request created.
No live runtime validation was performed; Lane 4 must run the wired graph before tracker promotion.

blockers.description: Main Flow has combined hand/contact masks but does not yet expose left/right per-hand mask slots required by the Lane 2 contact-pair graph.
blockers.next_action: Lane 1 should implement the wiring request and back up WAVE42_MAIN_FLOW_20260702.json before editing.

blockers.description: The strict body contact graph has not been live-run with the new contact-control artifact and actual mask inputs.
blockers.next_action: After Lane 1 wiring, Lane 4 should run a short live validation window and return endpoint/output evidence.

blockers.description: No tracker row can be promoted from structural artifacts alone.
blockers.next_action: Lane 5 should ingest the artifact as provisional evidence and wait for Lane 4 runtime outputs before promotion.
